title: Uruguayan Beef Skewers
description: A classic Uruguayan dish featuring marinated beef skewers, perfect for grilling. The combination of savory and spicy flavors will tantalize your taste buds.

ingredients.name: beef (1 pound, cut into 1-inch cubes)
ingredients.notes: Use a mix of chuck and sirloin for best flavor

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, olive oil, garlic, chili flakes, salt, and black pepper.
Add the beef cubes to the marinade and mix until coated.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Thread the marinated beef onto skewers, leaving a little space between each cube.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the beef reaches an internal temperature of 160°F.
Transfer the skewers to a plate and let rest for 5 minutes.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped onion and bell pepper, and accompanied by lemon wedges.
